docs.title: Summary
docs.text:
This page present a summary of the differrent metadata records distributed at https://catalogue.hakai.org.

Please refer to the issue page for a summary of the different issues encountered.

docs.title: Spatial Distribution
docs.text: This map present the differet polygons and coordinates associated with all the metadata records.

docs.title: Citations over time
docs.text:
